sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, date DateTime, amount Decimal(10, 2));
SELECT value, count() FROM test_table WHERE indexHint(value BETWEEN 's' AND 't') GROUP BY value HAVING count() > 0 ORDER BY count() DESC;
SELECT id, indexHint(value = 'test') FROM test_table WHERE amount BETWEEN 100 AND 250 GROUP BY id, amount HAVING indexHint(amount >= 100) ORDER BY id ASC;
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id UInt32, foreign_id UInt32, join_date DateTime, amount Decimal(12, 4));
INSERT INTO join_table (join_id, foreign_id, join_date, amount) VALUES (1, 1, '2023-02-01 10:00:00', 50.99), (2, 2, '2023-02-02 20:00:00', 150.45);
SELECT tt.value, jt.amount FROM test_table tt JOIN join_table jt ON indexHint(tt.id = jt.foreign_id) WHERE tt.amount BETWEEN 10 AND 200 ORDER BY tt.value;
SELECT indexHint(value = 'sample') AS sample_flag, count() FROM test_table WHERE amount BETWEEN 50 AND 300 GROUP BY sample_flag HAVING sample_flag = 1 ORDER BY count() DESC;
SELECT id, indexHint(amount BETWEEN 100.00 AND 300.00) AS amount_check FROM test_table WHERE indexHint(value NOT LIKE '%e%') GROUP BY id HAVING amount_check = 1 ORDER BY id;
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT indexHint(value) FROM test_table WHERE date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-01-03') AS subquery HAVING count() > 0;

SELECT indexHint(amount) AS total_amount, sum(indexHint(amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY indexHint(value)) FROM test_table WHERE indexHint(date >= '2023-01-01') AND date <= '2023-01-03' GROUP BY value ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
